chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Constitutional Petition No. D – 6673 of 2015 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGES Disposed of matter: For hearing of CMA No.3639/2018 (U/S 151 CPC) 04.09.2025 Mr. Salman Yousuf, Advocate for the Petitioner. Ms. Masooda Siraj, Advocate for the Respondent. Mr. Muhammad Akbar Khan, Asstt. Attorney General -------------------------------------- Learned counsel for the petitioner has submitted that the assessment of the disputed GD No.KAPW-HC-76109-31-10-2015 has been finalized by the respondent Collectorate and the Valuation Ruling No.767/2015 has been withdrawn. Contention of the learned counsel appears to be correct. Accordingly, the application is allowed as prayed. Nazir is directed to release the amount deposited pursuant to order dated 28.10.2015 along with any profit accumulated thereon, subject to deposit of certificate(s) by the petitioner. JUDGE JUDGE Nadeem
